productDisplayName: Puma Men Volley HP Brown Casual Shoes
description: Ideal for use in college or on casual Fridays at work, these sneakers from puma define your personality in a classy, understated way. Its minimalistic approach enhances the style factor. Upper Elaborate design with high-quality leather upper for enhanced durability Classic 6-hole lacing for snug Fit puma suede form-strip and PUMA cat logo for style Midsole Extra-flat sole made of vulcanized rubber Outsole Carbon rubber outsole for casual use
